description: Transform segment-nodes. The geometric transformation may be a translation and/or scaling. If combined, the operations are performed in the order: scale translate . The scale operation is always performed with respect to origin . All nodes are transformed if < range > is not supplied.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 7.0 contents command index.

keywords.name: merge-tolerance
keywords.description: Set the merge tolerance. When supplied, this will be used as a tolerance for merging nodes.

keywords.name: origin
keywords.description: Set the origin (node center) of the transformation v3 (3D vector in local ( \(u,v,w\) ) system).

keywords.name: scale
keywords.description: Scale the nodes; f1 = scale factor along the the horizontal coordinate, f2 = scale factor along the vertical coordinate.

keywords.name: translate
keywords.description: Translate nodes. nodes are moved by v3 (3D vector in local ( \(u,v,w\) ) system).

keywords.name: control-point
keywords.description: Move/freeze control points. When true (the default), control points are moved when the points they are associated with are moved. Control points will be “frozen” when false .
